segments.text: Can he make it back? What's the situation?
segments.original_text: 帰ってこれるのか?どうなんですか?

segments.text: He's back if there's no edgeguard!
segments.original_text: 復帰阻止が来なければ帰れます

segments.text: This is where he has to hang on! Final push!
segments.original_text: ここはあえてラスト我慢です
先ほどからつかまって

segments.text: Oh no, that's bad! That's so bad!

full_text: Can he make it back? What's the situation? He's back if there's no edgeguard! This is where he has to hang on! Final push! He's on the ledge Oh no, that's bad! That's so bad! But even from here!
